creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #2)
I know it's strange, that's why I posted this log :)

I have no modifications, only vanilla FreeBSD/powerpc64 12.0-ALPHA8, my make.conf is exactly this:
DEVELOPER=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/tmp

I have the same error with gcc6 and will post a patch later. For now, I'll try poudriere testport on amd64.
